src: var CK=ctx.CanvasKit,c=ctx.getCanvas(),f=ctx.currentFrame,F=CK.PaintStyle.Fill,S=CK.PaintStyle.Stroke;function pt(cr,st,w){var p=new CK.Paint();p.setStyle(st);p.setColor(CK.parseColorString(cr));p.setAntiAlias(true);if(w)p.setStrokeWidth(w);return p;}var vp=new CK.Paint();vp.setStyle(F);vp.setColor(CK.Color4f(0.02,0.71,0.83,0.08));vp.setAntiAlias(true);c.drawCircle(195,422,300,vp);var D=[[48,130,24,0,0],[312,190,32,0.3,1],[185,75,18,0.5,2],[55,410,20,0.7,0],[335,520,28,0.1,1],[195,660,22,0.4,0],[105,710,14,0.8,2],[295,110,36,0.2,1],[85,560,18,0.6,2],[255,360,26,0.9,2],[45,780,24,0.3,1],[345,720,16,0.5,0]];var C=['#06B6D4','#FB7185','#FBBF24'];for(var i=0;i<D.length;i++){var s=D[i],bx=s[0],by=s[1],sz=s[2],ph=s[3],tp=s[4];var cyc=f*0.035+ph*6.28,fy=Math.sin(cyc)*14,fx=Math.cos(cyc*0.7)*7,rot=f*0.025+ph*3.14,sc=1+Math.sin(cyc*1.3)*0.1;var x=bx+fx,y=by+fy,size=sz*sc,h=size/2,cl=C[i%3];if(tp==0){c.save();c.translate(x,y);c.rotate(rot*57.3);c.drawRect(CK.XYWHRect(-h,-h,size,size),pt(cl,F));c.restore();}else if(tp==1){c.drawCircle(x,y,h,pt(cl,F));}else{c.save();c.translate(x,y);c.rotate(rot*57.3);c.drawCircle(0,0,h*0.7,pt(cl,S,2.5));c.restore();}}

src: var CK=ctx.CanvasKit,c=ctx.getCanvas(),f=ctx.currentFrame,F=CK.PaintStyle.Fill,S=CK.PaintStyle.Stroke;function pt(cr,st,w){var p=new CK.Paint();p.setStyle(st);p.setColor(CK.parseColorString(cr));p.setAntiAlias(true);if(w)p.setStrokeWidth(w);return p;}var vp=new CK.Paint();vp.setStyle(F);vp.setColor(CK.Color4f(0.98,0.44,0.52,0.08));vp.setAntiAlias(true);c.drawCircle(195,422,300,vp);var D=[[55,100,20,0,1],[315,180,30,0.2,2],[170,60,24,0.5,0],[45,450,18,0.7,2],[340,550,26,0.1,0],[185,680,20,0.4,1],[90,750,16,0.8,2],[305,130,34,0.3,0],[75,600,22,0.6,1],[265,390,28,0.9,0],[50,800,18,0.3,1],[350,700,14,0.5,2]];var C=['#FB7185','#FBBF24','#06B6D4'];for(var i=0;i<D.length;i++){var s=D[i],bx=s[0],by=s[1],sz=s[2],ph=s[3],tp=s[4];var cyc=f*0.035+ph*6.28,fy=Math.sin(cyc)*14,fx=Math.cos(cyc*0.7)*7,rot=f*0.025+ph*3.14,sc=1+Math.sin(cyc*1.3)*0.1;var x=bx+fx,y=by+fy,size=sz*sc,h=size/2,cl=C[i%3];if(tp==0){c.save();c.translate(x,y);c.rotate(rot*57.3);c.drawRect(CK.XYWHRect(-h,-h,size,size),pt(cl,F));c.restore();}else if(tp==1){c.drawCircle(x,y,h,pt(cl,F));}else{c.save();c.translate(x,y);c.rotate(rot*57.3);c.drawCircle(0,0,h*0.8,pt(cl,S,2.5));c.restore();}}
